languages.text: "Шальной осколок. Зацепило взрывом фраг-гранаты. Хвала Трону, глаз цел, иначе бы блюстители лишились одного из немногих компетентных командиров".
"Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the enforcers would have lost one of their few competent commanders."
languages.original_text: "Шальной осколок. Зацепило взрывом фраг-гранаты. Хвала Трону, глаз цел, иначе бы блюстители лишились одного из немногих компетентных командиров".

traits.locale_text: "Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the wardens would have lost one of their few competent commanders."
"Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the wardens would have lost one of their few competent commanders."
"Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the wardens would have lost one of their few competent commanders."

languages.text: «Metralla. Me rozó la explosión de una granada frag. Gracias al Trono que mi ojo ha salido indemne, porque los guardias habrían perdido a uno de sus pocos comandantes competentes».
languages.original_text: "Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the enforcers would have lost one of their few competent commanders."

traits.locale_text: «Metralla. Me rozó la explosión de una granada frag. Gracias al Trono que mi ojo ha salido indemne, porque los guardias habrían perdido a uno de sus pocos comandantes competentes».

languages.text: “被乱飞的手雷弹片擦到的。感谢黄金王座保住了我的眼睛，否则，执法者们可就要失去他们难得的一位称职指挥官了。”
languages.original_text: "Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the enforcers would have lost one of their few competent commanders."

traits.locale_text: “被乱飞的手雷弹片擦到的。感谢黄金王座保住了我的眼睛，否则，执法者们可就要失去他们难得的一位称职指挥官了。”

languages.text: « Shrapnel. J'ai été pris dans l'explosion d'une grenade à fragmentation. Grâce au Trône, mon œil est intact, sans quoi les prévôts auraient perdu l'un de leurs rares commandants dignes de ce nom. »
languages.original_text: "Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the enforcers would have lost one of their few competent commanders."

traits.locale_text: « Shrapnel. J'ai été pris dans l'explosion d'une grenade à fragmentation. Grâce au Trône, mon œil est intact, sans quoi les prévôts auraient perdu l'un de leurs rares commandants dignes de ce nom. »

languages.text: "Başıboş bir şarapnel parçası. Bir parça tesirli bomba patlaması beni sıyırdı. Taht'a şükürler olsun ki gözüm sağlam. Aksi hâlde infazcılar, az sayıdaki yetkin komutanlarından birini kaybedecekti."
languages.original_text: "Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the enforcers would have lost one of their few competent commanders."

traits.locale_text: "Başıboş bir şarapnel parçası. Bir parça tesirli bomba patlaması beni sıyırdı. Taht'a şükürler olsun ki gözüm sağlam. Aksi hâlde infazcılar, az sayıdaki yetkin komutanlarından birini kaybedecekti."

languages.text: "Granatsplitter. Bin in eine Explosion geraten. Dem Thron sei Dank ist mein Auge intakt, sonst hätten die Enforcer einen ihrer wenigen kompetenten Kommandeure verloren."
languages.original_text: "Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the enforcers would have lost one of their few competent commanders."

traits.locale_text: "Granatsplitter. Bin in eine Explosion geraten. Dem Thron sei Dank ist mein Auge intakt, sonst hätten die Enforcer einen ihrer wenigen kompetenten Kommandeure verloren."

languages.text: 「飛び散った破片。フラググレネードの爆発で擦り傷を負った。神聖なる王座に感謝、私の目は無事だ。そうでなければ、執行官は数少ない有能な指揮官を失っていただろう。」
languages.original_text: "Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the enforcers would have lost one of their few competent commanders."

traits.locale_text: 「飛び散った破片。フラググレネードの爆発で擦り傷を負った。神聖なる王座に感謝、私の目は無事だ。そうでなければ、執行官は数少ない有能な指揮官を失っていただろう。」
